steps.title: Read the table values
steps.content: The minimum wage was $1.00$ in 1960 and $1.50$ in 1970.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The percent increase is $50\%$, which matches B.

steps.title: Use the original value in the denominator
steps.content: Percent increase always compares the change to the original value. The change is $0.50$ dollar, and the original value is $1.00$, so the increase is $50%$.
